get.description: Returns the public OAuth provider and login-page configuration.
Generates a state token and emits a 302 redirect to the provider's authorize URL.

parameters.description: Optional Hydra login return URL. Only /oauth/login-prefixed values are honored.
parameters.name: return_to

schema.description: Optional Hydra login return URL. Only /oauth/login-prefixed values are honored.

parameters.description: Forwarded protocol scheme from reverse proxy.
parameters.name: X-Forwarded-Proto
